title: corallodendron longipes
intro: Corallodendron longipes, also known as the red-flowered coral tree, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the family Erythroxylaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Corallodendron longipes is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion.
